description: Create a content slide on whether aliens will visit Earth, using a two-column layout with survey context on the left and a horizontal bar chart of likely vs unlikely by market on the right.

header.headline: Aliens will visit earth
header.sub: For each of the following, please tell me how likely or unlikely you think they are to happen...?

left.body: Base: 23,721 adults aged 18 years and older in India, 18-74 in Canada, Republic of Ireland, Malaysia, the Philippines, South Africa, Turkey, and the United States, 20-74 in Thailand, 21-74 in Indonesia and Singapore, and 16-74 in all other countries. Friday, October 25 – Friday November 8, 2024
